item.title: Vintage Scott AM/FM stereo receiver - $75 (Portsmouth)
item.description: Works try it before you buy it. Located in Portsmouth RI

item.title: RCA Surround Sound Stereo Receiver - $60 (Cumberland)
item.description: Going a RCA surround sound stereo, receiver, works great no issues blackface 5.1 surround sound. Various inputs and outputs exactly as pictured. Specs per RCA on this model

item.title: Sansui 5000a Stereo Receiver - $225 (Exeter)
item.description: A nice Sansui 5000a receiver with the original wood case. Receiver has the replacement F- 6013 boards so no problem there. Case is in nice condition. Unit powers on and plays, however the left channel is weak. May be the pots just need cleaning, not sure but I do not have the time to diox them. All bulbs work and all functions work (only problem is the weak left channel). Wood case and replacements boards alone are worth more than my asking price. Asking $250 OBRO.

item.title: For Sale: Carver MXR130 Stereo Receiver - $185 (Scituate)
item.description: For Sale:

item.title: Vintage Denon DRA-25 Stereo Receiver 1989 30 WPC - $60 (Pawtucket)
item.description: Vintage Denon DRA-25 30 watt per channel stereo receiver from 1989

item.title: Sony Vintage Stereo Receiver in Great working condition - $50 (Lincoln)
item.description: Sony Vintage silverface Stereo Receiver in great working condition. Exactly as pictured. Any questions feel free to ask

item.title: Vintage Kenwood KR-5600 stereo receiver - $70 (Ashaway)
item.description: Vintage Kenwood KR-5600 stereo receiver Silver face. I'm thinning my holdings of receivers. Priced to move. Unit tunes, probably could benefit from switches being cleaned.

item.title: Vintage Carver 6250 Stereo Receiver 125 WPC 1988 w/ Remote - $300 (Pawtucket)
item.description: Vintage 1988 Carver 6250 Stereo Receiver with the original Carver remote control

item.title: Vintage NAD 7140 Integrated Stereo Receiver AM/FM 40 WPC Phono - $250 (Pawtucket)
item.description: I don't have speakers to test out the system, but it powers on and everything appears in good condition and working appropriately.

item.title: JVC Digital Receiver & Double Cassette Deck - $25 (Hope Valley)
item.description: UPDATE: Cassette deck has been sold!!!!

item.title: Teac R550USB cd-r, turntable cassette - $100 (Cranston)
item.description: Teac R550USB transfer records,cd and cassettes to computer or record cassettes and records directly to the built in CD-R. Some marks on top cover otherwise excellent.You'll need to download the manual. These were $600 new.Thanks for looking.

item.title: Kenwood Stereo Pre Amplifier & Onkyo Stereo Tuner - $175 (Pawtucket)
item.description: Kenwood Stereo Control Amplifier Model Basic C1 with Onkyo T-4037 Quartz Synthesized FM Stereo Tuner

item.title: Yamaha Stereo Receiver - $40 (North Kingstown)
item.description: Yamaha Stereo Receiver. 40 Watts. Works fine, use with phone/iPod and aux cord or other stereo components

item.title: Marantz Cinema 50 9.4 Channel A/V Receiver with Dolby Atmos and Built- - $1,399 (Wakefield)
item.description: We are selling our Cinema 50 as we have returned to 2 channel listening. We had been using the Cinema 50 in 2 channel pure direct mode with our new pair of tower speakers, however this week we acquired a new 2 channel amp and we are now selling our Cinema 50.

item.title: Kenwood KT-8300 AM/FM Stereo tuner - $75 (Portsmouth)
item.description: Works, great shape, located in Portsmouth RI.

item.title: Kenwood KR-6160 Receiver - $75 (Portsmouth)
item.description: Am/fm receiver, works, Can try it before you buy it. Located in Portsmouth RI.

item.title: Vintage Vector Research Stereo Graphic Equalizer in Great Working Cond - $60 (Lincoln)
item.description: I am selling a vintage Vector Research Stereo Graphic Equalizer in Great working condition. Various inputs and outputs, no issues works great exactly as pictured.

item.title: FOR SALE: MICRO SEIKI DD-40 TURNTABLE - $1,600
item.description: Up for sale one Micro Seiki DD-40 turntable in nice condition with original box and manual. Also, in good condition original dust cover, 45-RPM adapter and removable headshell. Comes with Ortofon VMS-30 cartridge. The plinth is rosewood veneer in excellent condition. I am the original owner purchased new in 1977. The turntable is 43 years old and has been sitting in the original box for over 15 years. There is a couple of small cracks near the dust cover hinges (see images). From a smoke free home. The turntable is sold as is per my description NO RETURNS.

item.title: Sony Cassette/Radio vintage model cfs -720 - $30 (Warwick)
item.description: Vintage Sony model cfs - 720 , detachable speakers. 30$ firm

item.title: Bose Model 100 Indoor Outdoor Stereo Speakers Work Great - $100 (Cumberland)
item.description: Selling a pair of Bose model 100 stereo speakers in white. They work great, the compact size produces an unbelievably large sound. Great Speakers when space could be an issue.

item.title: Onkyo TX-SR605 7 Channel Surround Sound Receiver - $60 (Attleboro) - $60 (Cumberland)
item.description: Selling my Onkyo 7 Channel surround sound receiver. 7.1 Surround Sound at 90 Watts Per Channel for a total of 630 Watts of Stereo Surround Sound. Switches HDM, Subwoofer outputs,Some button caps are missing but Everything seems to work ok.

item.title: Vintage Radio Shack ProX44AV Stereo Bookshelf Speakers - $50 (Cumberland)
item.description: These are the Next Generation of the speakers that started a HIFI revolution in miniaturization measuring just 5*5*8 approximately. Metal cabinets with a rear port and a metal grill made for either Automotive or Home purposes, huge sound in a small ported cabinet made of solid metal, virtually indestructible and incredible sound.

item.title: Shure wireless receiver - $60 (Woonsocket)
item.description: Shure BLX4R H10 542-572MHz Rackmount Wireless Receiver in black.

item.title: Portable Turntable/Record Player - $50 (Woonsocket)
item.description: CR6002A-BK

item.title: Vintage Technics cassette deck player - $40 (Westerly ri)
item.description: $40 cash as is never tested powers on

item.title: Denon Receiver - $200
item.description: Denon Home Theater Receiver. Not much use on it, used it as a 2nd system in the house. Plenty of HDMI ports, My man cave has recently been turned into a kids playroom so no need for this anymore. Will sell for $200

item.title: Tascam Porta02 MKII Ministudio 4-Track Analog Cassette Recorder - $200 (Warwick)
item.description: Tested and confirmed working. There is a slight constant background hiss on the headphone out and the headphone pot appears to be a bit scratchy.

item.title: Dennon Surround Receiver - $200 (Smithfield)
item.description: Dennon Surround Receiver with remote like new. $200

item.title: Vintage Original Large Advent Loudspeaker Stereo Speakers with boxes - $400 (Pawtucket)
item.description: Probably the nicest pair of the famous " OLA's" I've seen around. These are freshly refoamed and even come with an extra fried egg Advent tweeter, 1 Advent Loudspeaker Crossover, and Masonite woofer. Not to mention the original boxes stamped from 1972

item.title: Single JBL L26 Stereo Speaker - $99 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice JBL L26 speaker. Center of tweeter is pushed in and one binding post is missing the piece you push in to accept wire. I have not tested the speaker but I can if necessary. Cool speaker for $99 firm.

item.title: Sony PS-X60 Turntable with Audio Technica AT92E Cartridge - $175 (Cranston)
item.description: Very nice, heavy duty Sony PS-X60 turntable with an Audio Technica AT92E phono cartridge. Great cosmetic condition and everything works. It sounds fantastic. You can read reviews online of how nice this table is. I I have it hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Priced to sell at $175 firm.

item.title: Sony AM/FM CD Cassette Player BOOMBOX - $50 (Cumberland)
item.description: Selling A vintage Sony AM/FM stereo, cd, Cassette Player, Boombox. Works great, all aspects of it have been tested and function perfectly. Analog Radio with built in Antenna picks up those difficult Radio Stations with ease. No AC cord but it looks like one that should be readily available . Boombox works perfectly on 6D batteries which are included.

item.title: Teac Vintage Surround Sound Receiver In Great Condition - $60 (Cumberland)
item.description: Teac Surround Sound Receiver in great working condition. Black face, Digital display, Subwoofer output 5.1 Surround Sound, Works great, no issues

item.title: Onkyo stereo - $125 (Middletown)
item.description: Onkyo stereo - like new condition - $125 OBO

item.title: Cambridge Soundworks Stereo Surround Sound Speakers in Great Condition - $60 (Cumberland)
item.description: Cambridge soundworks stereo speakers in great working condition. Small size and fantastic sound. Easily wall mounted.

item.title: Mini stereo - $100 (Warwick)
item.description: New in the box plays 5cds single cassette charges iPhone & iPod to play your music with remote 240 watts power $100 firm serious inquiries! No holds Ty

item.title: Vintage Lafayette Analog Solid State Stereo Table Radio - $60 (Attleboro)
item.description: Vintage Lafayette AM/FM Table Radio in good working condition. Wooden Cabinet Exactly as pictured, has RCA inputs in the back for a tape/aux input as well as a Phono Input. Analog Tuner pulls in hard to get stations way better than the newer digital ones.

item.title: Denon Vintage AM/FM Stereo Tuner Works Great - $60 (Cumberland)
item.description: Works great, no issue. Analog Tuner pulls in hard to get stations. Denon Quality and Sound

item.title: Technics Vintage Dual Cassette Player Recorder in Great Condition - $80 (Cumberland)
item.description: As pictured

item.title: Vintage Pioneer PL-41 turntable - $300 (Ashaway)
item.description: Very clean and operable vintage Pioneer PL-41 turntable. New stylus, new thrust bearing (a common replacement item over the life of this model.) Google reviews online. Condition of this unit is 9 out 10. Wooden plinth is awesome - and great looking vintage design item. Dust cover holds open with the designed `kick stand.' Audio output cables still have original Japanese paper labels! I also have a paper copy of the operator manual.

item.title: Vintage Boston Acoustic A150's Speakers Stereo 3 Way 1985 - $225 (Pawtucket)
item.description: Vintage Boston Acoustic A150 3 Way Stereo Speakers for sale

item.title: Vintage Advent/1 Speakers Bookshelf Stereo equipment - $175 (Pawtucket)
item.description: Vintage Advent/1 Bookshelf stereo speakers for sale only, no trades(speaker stands are NOT included)

item.title: Pioneer elite AV receiver - $150 (Warwick)
item.description: Pioneer AV receiver

item.title: Technics turntable - $275 (Warwick)
item.description: Technics turntable

item.title: Vintage Automatic Radio 3 Way Bookshelf Stereo Speakers - $49 (Cranston)
item.description: This is a beautiful pair of Automatic Radio FSA-7888 stereo bookshelf speakers from the 1970's. Excellent condition. Have been recapped (new capacitors in the crossovers) and they sound fantastic. Three way with 8" woofers, 5" midranges and 2" alnico tweeters. They are very efficient and I used them with a low watt tube amplifier with fantastic results but any amplifier or receiver is good. Cabinets are 17 1/2"H x 11 3/8"W x 8 1/2"D. Cool hand twistable, screw type binding posts. I can demonstrate them working at my house. Gorgeous vintage speakers that sound amazing for $49 firm.

item.title: Denon & Polk Stereo System - $900 (Middletown, RI)
item.description: Includes Denon receiver and Polk Audio speakers. Denon AVR-3805, Denon DVD- 1920, Polk Monitor 60 towers, Polk Rm-20 subwoofer, Polk F/Xi3 Di / Bi pole surrounds, Polk CSi3 center Channel. Rarely used all in very good condition. Asking $900 for all or make an offer

item.title: Turntable to transfer vinyl to USB price reduced - $30 (Tiverton)
item.description: Brand new with built in speakers

item.title: Pioneer Surround Sound Receiver 500 Watts Great Condition - $100 (Cumberland)
item.description: Selling a nice vintage pioneer VSX D457 surround sound receiver. It is in great condition both aesthetically and functionality. The receiver has Dolby pro logic surround sound and a subwoofer output, as well as a great FM Tuner section that easily pulls hard to gas stations. Inputs include two tape decks, a phono input, CD, DVD, TV, and many others. It is has 500 Watt output into 5 channels. Condition is exactly as its pictured

item.description: In great cosmetic and working condition. Comes with slipmat. Does not come with a cartridge/needle and cover is missing. Can probably dig up the headshell if desired.

item.description: As pictured

item.title: Cambridge Soundworks Vintage 3 Piece Stereo Speaker System - $80 (Cumberland)

item.title: Vintage Infinity Sterling SS 2003 Speakers bookshelf pair 90s stereo - $65 (Pawtucket)
item.description: Vintage 90s Infinity Sterling SS 2003 Bookshelf Speakers (speaker stands not included)

item.title: Vintage Audio Denon DRA-300 - $75
item.description: The Denon DRA-300 is a moderately powered, moderately priced stereo receiver with digital-synthesis tuning for both the AM and FM bands. Its audio amplifier section is rated to deliver 33 watts per channel into 8-ohm loads from 20 to 20,000 Hz with no more than 0.05 per cent total harmonic distortion. According to Denon, the power amplifiers employ a "non-switching" variable-bias circuit that reduces high-frequency distortion.

item.title: Vintage Radio Shack / Realistic / Micronta Hoard - $150 (Wrentham)
item.description: This is all stuff that I've used at some point in my distant past. Everything is branded as indicated. It is all at least 35 years old and everything works except the 12" speakers. Included in the lot:

item.description: This vintage receiver from the 80's still works 100%; they built stuff to last back then! The audio quality is excellent; specs are below for the technically minded.

item.description: Brand new in the box. Holds a charge for Built in Microphone, 10 hours charges with the USB cord and can be plugged directly into a device with it's included stereo cord, both cords included instructions etc. Brand new in the box

item.title: Sony 100 Watt Powered Subwoofer In Great Condition - $60 (Cumberland)
item.description: Sony Powered Sub in great working condition. Small size but powerful 100 Watt Output. Convenient front controls for volume and on/off. Simple 1 wire hookup to most any stereo/surround sound system pop

item.title: Bluetooth Speaker - $40 (Woonsocket)
item.description: Wireless stereo Bluetooth connectivity

item.title: Tandberg TD20A - Studio Tape Deck - $900 (Lincoln)
item.description: Tandberg TD20A - This unit is the rare factory optional 15" ips version with 2 track heads more suitable for professional and studio recording applications. Will include the reels and tape in the photo along with the operators manual. If you see this ad the unit is available. Adult owned. Non smoker. Serious inquires only please. Email me your contact number if interested.

item.title: Surround Sound Complete - $100 (North Kingstown)
item.description: I paid $2500 for this Surround sound set up back when they came out @ the old Tweeter store

item.title: HDTV by Sanyo - $49 (Waterford Connecticut)
item.description: I am the original owner. Had this T.V. for 11 years and never had one problem with it. Great condition. Comes with original owners manual and a quick start up foldout poster. I do not have original box it came in. Height is 19.1 and width is 26.1. 720P. Great Christmas gift. Comes with original remote. Side panel has Digital Audio output (Coaxial), Component Video INput (Video2 or Video3), PC input and Stereo Audio (Mini), Analog/Digital Antenna Input, S-Video Input (Video 1), AV input (Video1-Composite), Stereo Audio ou (L/R) Jacks, HDMI (Input1 or Input2).. an all digital AV interface that acceptes uncompressed video signals for the very best picture possible and USB input to view photos stored on USB device. Call Lou [26]show contact info or cell [27]show contact info . Comes with stand. I don't have wall mount.

item.title: NEW DENON DL-103 MC PHONO CARTRIDGE - $300 (Foster)
item.description: HI I purchased this cartridge new for a turntable I had up for sale. It was the recomended cartridge but sold the turntable without it. I have the original sales reciept as well. It was purchased at Safe & Sound in Chicapee Ma. I have no use for it as I run an Ortafon Quintet Black S.

item.title: TEAC A-3440 Reel to Reel 1/4" Tape Recorder (Super Clean) - $1,250 (Johnston)
item.description: TEAC A-3440 Reel to Reel 1/4" Tape Recorder (Super Clean) The wooden sides have been removed for rack mounting and do not have them.

item.title: Adcom GFA-2535 Four Channel Amplifier - $175 (Cranston)
item.description: Adcom GFA-2535 four channel amplifier in very good condition and works perfectly. Bridgeable to mono. Perfect for bi-amping your speakers or running 2 sets of speakers. Hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Excellent deal for $175 firm.

item.title: Rotel RQ-970BX Phono Preamplifier MM&MC - $99 (Cranston)
item.description: Awesome phono preamp for the money. Rotel RQ-970BX. It works with both moving magnet and moving coil cartridges. If you are just using a receiver's phono section, this will be a great upgrade. These usually sell for $150-200 used. Sweet deal for $99 firm.

item.description: Nice used receiver in working condition

item.description: Works Great with the exception of the cassette deck which doesn't seem to function at all, not sure if it doesn't work or just can't figure it out

item.description: I am moving out of state. Must sell my beautiful Samick Baby Grand player Piano with updated MP3 player with cassette. $2100 obo. More information can be found at: https://www.pianocorder.info/

item.title: E-Mu Systems ProFormance / 1+ 16 Bit True Stereo Piano Module Model 91 - $150 (Providence)
item.description: Thanks for looking! The price is negotiable, send me in your best offer. Local pick up or meet up, cash only.

item.title: Fargen diagonal 2x12 cab with great speakers - $500 (North Providence)
item.description: Fargen oval open-back diagonal 2x12 cabinet in a sweet orange tolex with some fun fading patterns on it. Includes a WGS ET65 speaker in the bottom (American voicing with great low-mids) and Celestion Neo Creamback in the top (greenback-style upper mids and keeps the cabinet very light). Plug & play jack so you can run each 8 ohm speaker separately in stereo or both speakers in series (16 ohm) or in parallel (4 ohm). Not a lot of tube amps like a 4 ohm load, but try your solid state power amp like a Quilter into the 4 ohm load and be blown away by the awesomeness!

item.title: Emotiva BASX PT-100 preamp stereo audophile sound system - $275 (Providence)
item.description: Great little audiophile quality pre-amp. USB interface for powered desktop speakers or powered stereo system. Specs can be found online, perfect condition unit includes original box, manual, packaging, dust cover, original remote, and cables.

item.title: Home Theater/Music Room, Onkyo, Polk RTI, JBL, Stands, Wiring - $1,200 (Cumberland)
item.description: $1200 for everything. I have a complete home theater or music room set that comes with everything you need. All Polk speakers come in a Cherry Wood finish which all are in fantastic shape. Speakers are in like new condition. All come with grills in like new condition. Receiver 100% works and in great shape. All speaker stands filled 50% with sand to weigh down and sound deaden. Music and movies sound great! Have boxes for the floor speakers and subs. Also have the foam for the bookshelf speakers to assist with transporting the equipment safely.

item.title: Acoustic A-1000 acoustic guitar amplifier - $250
item.description: Acoustic A1000 acoustic instrument amplifier in excellent condition. 2 individual channels, each with 2 combination inputs (XLR/1/4"). Both channels feature controls for volume, bass, midrange and treble. 2 independent digital effects processors. Aux input with level control and Bluetooth connectivity. Stereo headphone output. Balanced direct outputs for each channel with pre/post eq option. 2x 50-watt stereo amps. 2x8" Neodymium coaxial speakers. Very low hours of use.

item.title: Roland FP4F Keyboard - $1,700 (North Providence)
item.description: o Roland's popular FP-4 piano acclaimed SuperNATURAL Piano engine

item.title: Crown CST-4200 - $150 (North Kingstown)
item.description: The Crown CST-4200 is a top-of-the-line commercial stereo power amplifier that delivers exceptional audio performance for various applications. Whether you're setting up a professional sound system in a venue, studio, or home entertainment space, the CST-4200 offers robust power and clarity. With its reliable Crown engineering and reputation for quality, this amplifier is designed to meet the demands of audio enthusiasts and professionals alike.

item.title: Yamaha RX-V667 Home Theater Receiver - $50 (Cumberland)
item.description: For sale: Yamaha RX-V667 home theater receiver. Multi-zone, HDMI 1080 support, Dolby surround sound, many inputs. In perfect working condition with no scratches, flaws, or issues. Comes with remote control, antenna, power cord.
